name: mosaic-token-extensions-admin
description: TypeScript SDK, CLI, and UI for managing standard token types on Solana (ex: Stablecoin & Arcade Tokens)

scripts.precommit: pnpm run format && pnpm run lint:fix
scripts.check: pnpm run build && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run type-check

author: Solana Foundation

pnpm._dependencyNotes: These overrides pin the whole workspace onto the Solana Kit v6 ecosystem. Kit is capped at 6.x (not the newer 7.x) because the token-acl SDKs (@solana/token-acl-sdk, @solana/token-acl-gate-sdk) peer-depend on @solana/kit ^6.0.0. @solana-program/token-2022 is pinned to the published 0.12.0 and then PATCHED via pnpm.patchedDependencies (patches/@solana-program__token-2022@0.12.0.patch) to add the confidential mint/burn InstructionPlan helpers (getConfidentialMintInstructionPlan/getConfidentialBurnInstructionPlan) on the /confidential subpath. The patch is a git-tracked text file (unlike a vendored .tgz), so it applies on CI/Vercel with --frozen-lockfile. This is INTERIM: drop the patch and bump to the published version (>=0.13) once the upstream Track A PR merges and a real release ships. NOTE: 0.11+ MOVED the confidential helpers/derives from the root barrel to the @solana-program/token-2022/confidential subpath (they were not removed); the SDK imports them from that subpath. @solana/token-acl-sdk@0.4.0 depends on token-2022 0.12.0 and resolves against this patched 0.12.0 — safe because it only consumes stable core token-2022 exports (unchanged) and the patch only adds to the /confidential entry. Two packages still declare v5 kit ranges but are safe on v6 because they only touch codecs/signers/addresses (unchanged v5->v6): @solana-program/zk-elgamal-proof and @solana/connector are forced onto v6 via the @solana/kit override and the @solana/* transitive overrides. See packages/sdk/package.json `_dependencyNotes`.
